audit_score_rationale: All 24 block-severity linter checks pass cleanly with zero warns. Page mirrors the Arizona wage exemplar's structure precisely (masthead → breadcrumb → eyebrow → partner-badge → h1 → subhead → last-reviewed → G2 row → CTA → hero → chip-nav → capsule → 8 Q sections including unique Arkansas Youth-Hiring-Act child-labour section → pullquote → tagline-close → links-rail → meta-footer → customer-strip). Inline stamp-block satisfies inline-visual requirement and reinforces the AR Code § 11-4-405 7-day-on-demand final-pay rule. Hero photo from Unsplash (Mick Haupt, Little Rock AR skyline) 118KB. Strong cross-state contrast in links-rail anchors to Alabama (federal-only) and Arizona (CPI-indexed). Internal-link density elevated by inclusion of three Arkansas sibling anchors (state-tax, worker-classification, termination) all live. Verified facts against primary AR Code sources and DOL FLSA Fact Sheet #22.

retrofit_needed.notes: United States parent (wave-3) and Arkansas state parent (wave-4) render as plain text per link-gate. Promote to anchors when those pages ship. The Arkansas state-tax sibling, worker-classification sibling, and termination sibling chip-navs do not yet include a 'Wages & overtime' chip-nav entry pointing here; retrofit those siblings' chip-navs when next touched.
